---
title: "Weekly updates"
listing:
  contents: listing.yml
  type: grid
  fields: [date, title, description]
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 20
---

> TODO: Weekly status slides shared with the advisor. Each entry is a
> standalone revealjs deck. Click any card to open the slides; reveal.js
> navigation (arrow keys, ESC for overview) applies.
